name: cpp
description: Claude Power Pack - per-family Claude Code plugins (phased migration off the legacy symlink installer; see ADR 0001, epic #417 Phase B).

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Named concurrent browser sessions over the upstream @playwright/mcp server via a lease-desk pool: /browser:session and /browser:help.

plugins.name: cicd
plugins.description: CI/CD automation: Makefile init/check, pipeline codegen (GitHub Actions or self-hosted Woodpecker), container generation, health checks, smoke tests, deploy verification, and tiered IaC scaffolding.

plugins.name: claude-md
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md management: lint for missing CI/CD, Docker, and troubleshooting directives.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Codex CLI orchestration: read-only delegation (/codex:ask), one-shot exec with JSONL monitoring, full issue lifecycle delegation (/codex:auto), and readiness checks.

plugins.name: cpp
plugins.description: Claude Power Pack cross-cutting help/meta: /cpp:help maps every CPP command family. Help-only by design (ADR 0001); the legacy symlink installer is not distributed as a plugin.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation and diagrams: C4 architecture diagrams as GitHub-renderable Mermaid (/documentation:c4) and PowerPoint generation (/documentation:pptx).

plugins.name: evaluate
plugins.description: Multi-model evaluation flow for issues, ideas, and architectural decisions (/evaluate:issue).

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Worktree-based GitHub issue lifecycle: start, eli5 necessity gate, check, finish, merge, deploy, auto, sync, cleanup, status, and doctor. Issue-anchored branch naming and quality gates, no locks or Redis - just git.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub issue management: create, list, view, update, and close issues from Claude Code (/github:issue-*).

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Project scaffolding: /project:init zero-to-GitHub-repo orchestration (repo creation, CLAUDE.md via native /init, CI/CD wiring).

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Automated web QA: /qa:test drives browser-based test runs against a running application.

plugins.name: second-opinion
plugins.description: Cross-vendor second-opinion code review client commands (/second-opinion:start, /second-opinion:models); pairs with the external mcp-second-opinion server.

plugins.name: secrets
plugins.description: Secrets lifecycle with masking: set, get, list, rotate, delete, validate, run-with-secrets, and a web UI (/secrets:*).

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security scanning: quick/full/deep scans (gitleaks, git history, pip-audit), finding explanations, and risk-graded permission audits (/security:*).

plugins.name: self-improvement
plugins.description: Self-improvement loops: post-run friction retro + codify, deployment retrospectives, and the fleet-wide friction-knowledge ledger (/self-improvement:*).
